answer:
The Podio API supports multiple authentication methods depending on your application requirements [1][2][3][4]. All methods require initialization with your API client ID and secret [1][2][3][4].

1. Server-side flow: Used for web applications where users authenticate via a redirect to Podio [1][2][3].
2. App authentication: Used for automated scripts or accessing a single app without user interaction by providing an app ID and app token [1][2][3][4].
3. Password authentication: Used for testing, batch jobs, or scenarios where other flows are unavailable; it uses user credentials [1][2][3][4].
4. Client-side flow: Used specifically for browser-based single-page applications [2].
